title: Madras University Recruitment 2026 - Apply for Various Project Assistant Posts
description: The University of Madras has declared the official notification for the recruitment of various Project Assistant Jobs. Candidates with an M.Sc. can apply for the Madras University Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the last date of applciation. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2026 that...
